object.script:
signal={} Y,Yo,C,I,Q,R,G,B={},{},{},{},{},{},{},{} sq,sq2={},{} hdI,hdQ={},{} hdcolor={} igB=input.getBool restarted=true y=0 rotphase={} rotphase[0]={-74.9505,115.4133} --YIQ to YCbCr conversion matrix rotphase[1]={81.8215,53.1356} key=property.getText('key') for i=-864,1727 do hdI[i]=0 hdQ[i]=0 I[i]=0 Q[i]=0 end for i=-3456,6911 do Y[i]=0 end playing,rec=false,false peremotka=0 strf=string.format
for i=0,38 do --precalculate squares sq[i]=math.abs((i-19)/18)*((i-19)/18)*0.5957 end for n=0,26 do sq2[n] = math.abs((n-13)/12)*((n-13)/12)*0.5226 end
local sp,sup=string.pack,string.unpack function encode(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i) return sup('f',sp('I',a<<25|b<<18|c<<11|d<<4|i&15)),sup('f',sp('I',e<<25|f<<18|g<<11|h<<4|i>>4)) end function clamp(x,y,z) if x<y then x=y end if x>z then x=z end return x end k=1 function isinRect(x,y,X,Y)return touchx>=x and touchx<=X and touchy>=y and touchy<=Y and pressed end
brl=255 con=2.2 sat=1 framerate=FRAMERATE_HERE tickrate=62.5 framecount=FRAMECOUNT_HERE frameheight=FRAMEHEIGHT_HERE heightadjustment=(72-frameheight)/2
function onTick() lpressed=pressed pressed=input.getBool(1) touchx=input.getNumber(3) touchy=input.getNumber(4) if not lpressed then if isinRect(58,80,70,90) then peremotka=0 end if isinRect(25,91,58,96) then k=1 restarted=true end playing=playing~=isinRect(58,80,70,90) --toggle play rec=rec~=isinRect(3,82,8,93) --toggle SWMI output if isinRect(47,82,56,88) then if peremotka==-1 then --rewind peremotka=0 playing=false else peremotka=-1 playing=true end end if isinRect(72,82,82,88) then --fast forward if peremotka==1 then peremotka=0 playing=false else peremotka=1 playing=true end end end if (k==1 and peremotka==-1) or (k==framecount and (peremotka==1 or playing and peremotka==0)) then peremotka=0 playing=false end lnfr=nfr if playing then if peremotka==0 then if rec then nfr=y==72 if nfr then k=math.min(k+1,framecount) tick=false end else k=math.min(math.max(k+framerate/tickrate,1),framecount) --advance frames end end k=math.min(math.max(k+peremotka*8*framerate/tickrate,1),framecount) --fast forward/rewind end if playing or restarted or tick or igB(3) or rec and (nfr or lnfr) then restarted=false
if tick then
local k local x -- blur to the left/right local y -- blur to the top/bottom local z -- blur to the corners local Y,I,Q,R,G,B=Y,I,Q,R,G,B for i=0,96*frameheight-1 do if i%192>95 then k=(i>>1)-i//192*48-48 x=k+i%2*2-1 y=k+48 z=x+48 else k=(i>>1)-i//192*48 x=k+i%2*2-1 y=k-48 z=x-48 end if i%96==0 or i%96==95 then x=k z=y end if i>6815 or i<96 then y=k z=x end local I2=I[k]*0.5625+I[x]*0.1875+I[y]*0.1875+I[z]*0.0625 --upscaling the color local Q2=Q[k]*0.5625+Q[x]*0.1875+Q[y]*0.1875+Q[z]*0.0625 R[i]=Y[i]+0.9469*I2+0.6236*Q2 --YIQ to RGB conversion G[i]=Y[i]-0.2748*I2-0.6357*Q2 B[i]=Y[i]-1.1000*I2+1.7000*Q2 if R[i]<0 then R[i]=0 end if G[i]<0 then G[i]=0 end if B[i]<0 then B[i]=0 end R[i]=R[i]^con*brl G[i]=G[i]^con*brl B[i]=B[i]^con*brl if R[i]>255 then R[i]=255 end if G[i]>255 then G[i]=255 end if B[i]>255 then B[i]=255 end end
tick=false else text=property.getText("frame_"..strf('%.0f',k))
for i=0,96*frameheight-1 do --convert everything back signal[i]=key:find(text:sub(i+1,i+1),nil,true)-1 end
for i=0,12*frameheight-1 do hdcolor[i]=key:find(text:sub(i+96*frameheight+1,i+96*frameheight+1),nil,true)-1 hdI[i*2]=hdcolor[i]%3 hdQ[i*2]=(hdcolor[i]//3)%3 hdI[i*2+1]=(hdcolor[i]//9)%3 hdQ[i*2+1]=(hdcolor[i]//27) end
local sign,bl,lr,tb,ch local signal,Y,I,Q=signal,Y,I,Q for k=0,24*frameheight-1 do sign=signal[k*4+1]*111+signal[k*4+2] bl=(signal[k*4]/110) --2x2 block decoding lr=(sign%23-11)/11 tb=((sign//23)%23-11)/11 ch=((sign//529)-11)/11 lr=(lr*math.abs(lr)) tb=(tb*math.abs(tb)) ch=(ch*math.abs(ch)) Y[k*2+k//48*96]=(1+lr+tb+ch)*bl Y[k*2+k//48*96+1]=(1-lr+tb-ch)*bl Y[k*2+k//48*96+96]=(1+lr-tb-ch)*bl Y[k*2+k//48*96+97]=(1-lr-tb+ch)*bl I[k]=sq[signal[k*4+3]%13*3+hdI[k]]*sat Q[k]=sq2[signal[k*4+3]//13*3+hdQ[k]]*sat end tick = true end end if rec then if y<72 then for x=0,47 do --YIQ to YCbCr conversion C[x]=clamp((rotphase[y%2][1]*I[x+(y-heightadjustment)//2*48]+rotphase[y%2][2]*Q[x+(y-heightadjustment)//2*48]+60.5)//1,0,120) end for x=0,95 do Yo[x]=clamp((Y[(y-heightadjustment)*96+x]*120+.5)//1,0,120) end for i=0,15 do --SWMI output local out1,out2=encode(Yo[i*6],Yo[i*6+1],Yo[i*6+2],Yo[i*6+3],Yo[i*6+4],Yo[i*6+5],C[i*3],C[i*3+1],C[i*3+2]) output.setNumber(i*2+1,out1) output.setNumber(i*2+2,out2) end end y=y+1 if y>72 then y=0 end output.setBool(1,y==72) output.setBool(2,y%2==0) output.setBool(4,y==72 and rec) end output.setBool(24,rec) end
local s=screen local R,G,B=R,G,B function onDraw() for i=0,96*frameheight-1 do --drawing the image s.setColor(R[i],G[i],B[i]) s.drawRectF(i%96,i//96+heightadjustment,1,1) end s.setColor(200,50,0) s.drawRectF(0,72,96,24) s.setColor(0,0,0) s.drawText(25,90,'restart') s.drawRectF(0,72,41,7) s.setColor(255,255,255) local str=strf('%.0f',k//(framerate*60)) while #str<2 do str='0'..str end str=str..':' if k//framerate%60>9 then str=str..strf('%.0f',k//framerate%60) else str=str..'0'..strf('%.0f',k//framerate%60) end str=str..':' if k%framerate//1>9 then str=str..strf('%.0f',k%framerate//1) else str=str..'0'..strf('%.0f',k%framerate//1) end s.drawText(1,73,str) if playing then s.drawRectF(60,79,3,12) s.drawRectF(66,79,3,12) else s.drawTriangleF(70,85,60,80,60,90) end s.drawText(11,83,'SWMI') s.drawTriangleF(51,85,56,82,56,88) s.drawTriangleF(47,85,52,82,52,88) s.drawTriangleF(77.5,85,72,82,72,88) s.drawTriangleF(81.5,85,76,82,76,88) s.setColor(15,15,15) s.drawRectF(4,82,4,11) s.setColor(0,0,0) if rec then s.drawRectF(4,82,4,4) else s.drawRectF(4,89,4,4) end s.setColor(200,50,0) s.drawRectF(72,82,1,5) s.drawRectF(76,82,1,2) s.drawRectF(76,85,1,2) end
